Event: Atlantian Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 06/04/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: SL51
Voice of the Waters Wand's Soul

Once in a while, the unit afflicts the farthest enemy unit with the deep freeze effect for 3 sec., and also steals 35% physical and magic armor from all frozen enemy units for 3 sec. Stacks up to 1 times. For 3 sec., the frozen units cannot move or attack, and the cooldown of their abilities
(except those granted by the equipped set) is increased by 3 sec. When the deep freeze effect wears off, the target of the ability explodes and receives 375000 magic damage. Icicles fly out of them, hitting 2
nearest enemy units. On hit, icicles deal 312500 magic damage, increase the cooldown of the targets' gear and artifact abilities by 3 sec., and cast stiffness on them. The attack speed of stiffened units is reduced by 40% for 3 sec.

When an enemy unit is frozen, the soul's owner deals 390000 magic damage to them. The ability triggers at most once per 1 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
